product.description: • Clinically tested to manage eczema symptoms

displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value:
• Clinically tested to help relieve the symptoms of medically diagnosed mild to moderate eczema.*
• Specially formulated with ceramides, cholesterol and fatty acids in a 3:1:1 ceramides dominant molar ratio for daily eczema maintenance
• Contain 4 Moisturizing Ingredients - Petrolatum, Glycerin, Sodium PCA, Safflower oil
• Low pH to maintain optimal skin environment to support body’s own ceramide production.
• Significantly improves the skin barrier function measured by a reduction in trans-epidermal water loss (TEWL) in 28 days
• 85% of users with mild to moderate eczema experienced less flares, itch and irritation after use.
• Significantly improves skin hydration in 7 days Clinically tested to help reduce itch in mild to moderate eczema.
• Free from fragrance, preservatives and colours.
• Dermatologically tested

displayMetadata.name: COUNTRY/PLACE OF ORIGIN
displayMetadata.value: Australia

displayMetadata.name: PREPARATION
displayMetadata.value: Apply to dry and eczema-prone areas as often as required, especially after showering, bathing, exposure to harsh climatic conditions and at night.

displayMetadata.name: STORAGE INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: Store below 30°C

displayMetadata.name: INGREDIENTS
displayMetadata.value:
Aqua (Water), Glycerin, Petrolatum, Niacinamide, Paraffinum Liquidum, Dimethicone, Cetearyl Alcohol, Lactic Acid, Glyceryl Stearate Se, Ceteareth -20, Sodium Pca, Stearic Acid, Caprylyl Glycol, 1,2-Hexanediol, Laureth-3, Xanthan Gum, Sodium Hydroxide, Ceramide Np, Cholesterol, Carthamus Tinctorius
(Safflower) Seed Oil, Ceramide Eop

displayMetadata.name: ADDITIONAL INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: • Clinically tested to manage eczema symptoms

product.description: All SAFI’s products conform to international standards including Federal Drug Authority (FDA), European Economic Community (EEC)/COLIPA, British Pharmacopoeia (BP), Cosmetics, Toiletries & Fragrance Association (CTFA). SAFI products are available nationwide in all major pharmacies, supermarkets and hypermarkets. Our well trained beauty advisors are also available at specific outlets to assist you. With the tagline Selamat dan Suci, which means “Safe and Pure”, as the driving force behind the brand, SAFI ensures that its products are stringently developed to care for the well-being of its consumers, made from high quality ingredients and safe to be used by you and your whole family. SAFI. Safe and Pure.

displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value:
A water-based replenishing night moisturizer that is non-oily and absorbs fast. Intensively nourishes skin to help prevent dryness, brightens and repairs skin overnight. Wake up to radiant and revitalized healthy-looking complexion. Visibly evens out skin tone and boost luminosity:
• Refines pores and quickly penetrates into skin
• Enriched with powerful hydrating agents
• Skin feels fresh, soft and poreless
• Free from Paraben, Mineral Oil, Alcohol, Phthalates, Animal Testing and Animal derived ingredients
• Speed up skin brightening and luminosity
• Reduce the appearance of dark spots for even toned and brighter skin

displayMetadata.name: COUNTRY/PLACE OF ORIGIN
displayMetadata.value: Malaysia

displayMetadata.name: PREPARATION
displayMetadata.value:
1. Apply evenly unto freshly-cleansed face and neck.
2. Gently massage in circular motion until fully absorbed into skin.
3. Suitable for night usage.

displayMetadata.name: STORAGE INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: Store in cool and dry area

displayMetadata.name: INGREDIENTS
displayMetadata.value: Water, PEG-8, Myristic Acid, Stearic Acid, Potassium Hydroxide, Palmitic Acid, Glycerin, Lauric Acid, Butylene Glycol, Glyceryl Stearate, Polyquaternium-7, Tetrasodium EDTA, BHT, PEG-90M, Terminalia Ferdinandiana Fruit Extract, Nigella Sativa (Habbatus Sauda) Seed Oil, Borago Officinalis Seed Oil, Arginine, Lithothamnion Calcareum Extract, Perfluorodecalin, 4-Butylresorcinol, Dextrin, Mannitol, Simmondsia Chinensis Seed Oil, Diatomaceous Earth, Lecithin, Glycosphingolipids, Sucrose Palmitate.

displayMetadata.name: ADDITIONAL INFORMATION

SAFI. Safe and Pure.

product.description: Suu Balm Ceramide Moisturiser (Rapid Itch Relief) is formulated with natural cooling menthol to rapidly soothe and relieve itch, along with 5 types of skin-identical ceramides to replenish skin barrier. Designed for dry, itchy, sensitive and eczema-prone skin - it is free of steroids, parabens, fragrances and preservatives, making it gentle yet effective for quick relief.

displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value:
• Proven cooling itch relief in 5 mins!
• For eczema-prone and sensitive skin
• 5 types of skin-identical ceramides to replenish the skin barrier
• Cooling, light and non-sticky
• Paraben, preservative and fragrance-free
• No steroids
• Formulated the National Skin Centre, Singapore.

displayMetadata.name: COUNTRY/PLACE OF ORIGIN
displayMetadata.value: Malaysia

displayMetadata.name: PREPARATION
displayMetadata.value:
Used Suu Balm when your skin is itchy and dry, to soothe and moisturise. Apply 2 to 3 times daily to the affected areas. Do not use if you are allergic to any of the ingredients. Avoid the eyes, mouth, open/cut skin, or on sensitive areas as it may sting.
For children, try a little first to see if it is well tolerated; their skin can be more sensitive to menthol. Alternatively, try our Suu Balm Kids Ceramide Moisturiser (Gentle Itch Relief).

displayMetadata.name: STORAGE INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: Store in a cool, dry place

displayMetadata.name: INGREDIENTS
displayMetadata.value: Water, Glycerin, Menthol, Cetyl Alcohol, Cetearyl Alcohol, Palmitic Acid, Propanediol, Cyclopentasiloxane, Stearic Acid, C12-15 Alkyl Benzoate, Ceramide Np, Ceramide Ap, Ceramide As, Ceramide Ns, Ceramide Eop, Cholesterol, Pca, Saccharide Isomerate, Arginine, Phytosteryl/Octyldodecyl Lauroyl Glutamate, Caprylyl Glycol, Cyclohexasiloxane, Cetearyl Glucoside, Carbomer, 1,2-Hexanediol, Dipropylene Glycol, Citric Acid, Sodium Citrate, Tropolone, Hydrogenated Lecithin, Glyceryl Stearate

displayMetadata.name: ADDITIONAL INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: Suu Balm Ceramide Moisturiser (Rapid Itch Relief) is formulated with natural cooling menthol to rapidly soothe and relieve itch, along with 5 types of skin-identical ceramides to replenish skin barrier. Designed for dry, itchy, sensitive and eczema-prone skin - it is free of steroids, parabens, fragrances and preservatives, making it gentle yet effective for quick relief.

displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value:
• 2-in-1 UV Protection + Skin Brightening
• Quick & Easy no makeup makeup look

displayMetadata.name: COUNTRY/PLACE OF ORIGIN
displayMetadata.value: Japan

displayMetadata.name: PREPARATION
displayMetadata.value:
1. Apply evenly on face after moisturizer and before applying makeup.
2. Avoid direct contact with clothes, put on clothes after sunscreen dries.
3. For best results, re-apply at frequent intervals or after perspiration.
4. As with all sunscreen, cleanse thoroughly with makeup remover or cleanser (face/body wash)
5. For thorough removal, place makeup remover or cleanser on a towel or cotton pad and wipe off
6. Ensure cap is closed tightly after use.

displayMetadata.name: STORAGE INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: Keep away from high temperature or direct sunlight. Keep away from children and people with dementia to prevent accidental ingestion.

displayMetadata.name: INGREDIENTS

displayMetadata.value: Aqua, Glycerin, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil, Pentylene Glycol, Butyrospermum Parkii Butter, Cyclopentasiloxane, Cetearyl Alcohol, Sorbitol, Behenyl Alcohol, Glyceryl Stearate, Tocopheryl Acetate, Allantoin, Arginine, Caprylyl Glycol, Ceteareth, Cetyl Alcohol, Citric Acid, Dimethiconol, Disodium Edta, Disodium Ethylene Dicocamide Peg Disulfate, Glyceryl Stearate Citrate, Ceramide Np, Niacinamide, Panthenol, Pantolactone, Sodium Hyaluronate, Sodium Pca, Sodium Polyacrylate. Fil 1829.V00

displayMetadata.name: ADDITIONAL INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: This intense skin solution is specifically developed to hydrate and smooth rough, flaky skin for a full 24 hours. Ceramides hydrate and restore the skin's natural moisture barrier while Amino Acid maintains skin's hydration

metaData.Ingredients: Aqua, Glycerin, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil, Pentylene Glycol, Butyrospermum Parkii Butter, Cyclopentasiloxane, Cetearyl Alcohol, Sorbitol, Behenyl Alcohol, Glyceryl Stearate, Tocopheryl Acetate, Allantoin, Arginine, Caprylyl Glycol, Ceteareth, Cetyl Alcohol, Citric Acid, Dimethiconol, Disodium Edta, Disodium Ethylene Dicocamide Peg Disulfate, Glyceryl Stearate Citrate, Ceramide Np, Niacinamide, Panthenol, Pantolactone, Sodium Hyaluronate, Sodium Pca, Sodium Polyacrylate. Fil 1829.V00
metaData.Key Information:
• Cetaphil Ceramide Repair Lotion: Intensely Hydrates and Smoothest Rough Skin for 48 Hours
• Heals and Soothes Dry Skin: Skin Recovers Faster and Relieves Scratching
• New Ingredient Blend : Combination of Ceramides, Amino-Acids and Sunflower Seed Oil
• Developed for Even the Most Sensitive Skin: the Hypoallergenic, Non-Comedogenic Formula Is Fragrance Free and Paraben Free
metaData.Preparation: Use daily to soothe dry skin.
metaData.Storage Information: For external use only. Store below 30°C
